title: your journal, on your device
author: jer & extro
description: a memory that lives on your device. observers experience your day, your journal holds it, sol keeps it. open source, local, and private by covenant.

title: after me, only stronger
author: jer & extro
description: we filed sol pbc's original articles in january. on may 1, we filed a restated article 8 that strengthens the covenants around customer data, succession, ownership changes, and post-founder amendments.

title: a constraint, not a promise
author: jer & extro
description: i've been building tools for digital self-determination for 25 years. the AI finally caught up. here's what i built and why the company is structured the way it is.
